+
+        dt = np.datetime64(2348, 'W')  # 2015-01-01

+            dt2 = np.datetime64(dt, unit)
+            _assert_equal_hash(dt, dt2)
+
+            dt3 = np.datetime64(int(dt2.astype(int)) + 1, unit)
+            assert hash(dt) != hash(dt3)  # doesn't collide
+
+        for unit in ('h', 'm', 's', 'ms', 'us'):
+            dt2 = np.datetime64(dt, unit)
